More power needed than launch as said before: This game will demand more disk space in future years. When you buy CPUS, buy ones with more cores. Very few games have this technology of using ALL your cores, so it needs described to the gamer community... Games like this today are extremely difficult to code by anyone not of the absolute best talent on Earth. And lots of the best talent can't make these games, so they're rare... So remember: Turn off unused programs, even webbrowsers, and when you shop for CPU, buy the ones with many cores meant for gaming.
